zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Hydon於大約1272年出生在英國英格蘭戴文可萊希頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Hydon29歲，母親Isabel Fishacre29歲。她於1308年1月24日之前與Gilbert de Knovill結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1357年5月15日享年86歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文米可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Hydon于大约1272年出生在英国英格兰戴文可萊希頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard Hydon29岁，母亲Isabel Fishacre29岁。她于1308年1月24日之前与Gilbert de Knovill结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1357年5月15日享年86岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文米可。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Hydon was born about 1272, in Clayhidon, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Hydon, was 29 and her mother, Isabel Fishacre, was 29. She married Gilbert de Knovill before 24 January 1308. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 15 May 1357, at the age of 86, and was buried in Hemyock, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Hydon est née environ 1272, à Clayhidon, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Hydon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabel Fishacre, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Knovill avant 24 janvier 1308. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1357, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Hemyock, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Hydon um 1272 in Clayhidon, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Hydon 29 und ihre Mutter Isabel Fishacre 29. Sie hat vor 24. Januar 1308 Gilbert de Knovill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1357 im Alter von 86 Jahren und wurde in Hemyock, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Hydon è nata il circa 1272 nel Clayhidon, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Hydon, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Isabel Fishacre, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert de Knovill prima del 24 gennaio 1308. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 15 maggio 1357, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Hemyock, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Hydonが約1272年にイギリスイギリスデボンクレイヒドンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Hydonは29歳，母Isabel Fishacreは29歳であった。1308年1月24日以前にGilbert de Knovillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1357年5月15日に86歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンヘムイオックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Hydon(이)가 대략 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 클레이히던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Hydon(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Fishacre(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1308년 1월 24일 이전 Gilbert de Knovill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 5월 15일 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 헤미옥크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Hydon nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Clayhidon, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Hydon, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Fishacre, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert de Knovill antes 24 de janeiro de 1308. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1357, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Hemyock, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Hydon родилась около 1272 г. в местности клеихидон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Hydon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Fishacre, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Knovill перед 24 январь 1308 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 мая 1357 г. в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности хемекк, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Hydon nació aproximadamente 1272, en Clayhidon, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Hydon, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Isabel Fishacre, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Gilbert de Knovill antes de 24 de enero de 1308. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1357, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Hemyock, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
